name: Joiplay v1.20.590 - Download #1 RPG Maker Emulator {Apk}
snippet: JoiPlay is an emulator and game interpreter for RPG maker games. It allows you to run RPG maker games based on XP, VX, VX Ace, and RenPy on android smartphones.
